name: synapse-graph-skills
description: Engineering memory system for solo full-stack developers — partitioned context loading via graph topology.

synapse-graph-memory.description: Core retrieval protocol — 7-step decision tree with three-layer progressive disclosure. Handles status queries, cross-module impact analysis, and bounded BFS traversal.

synapse-timeline.description: Read-only timeline and open issues query. Parses Change Log and Open Issues from memory nodes with rich filtering by tag, date, and node.

synapse-daily-note.description: One-command NL-to-memory pipeline. Five stages: ingest (NL→JSON), suggest edges, interactive confirm, apply to meta/*.md, rebuild MAP, doctor validation.

synapse-init.description: Cold-start wizard. Auto-detects tech stack, infers module boundaries from src/ structure, generates skeleton nodes, copies helper scripts, and registers Claude Code hooks.

compatibility.python_deps: stdlib only (json, re, sys, datetime, pathlib)

known_issues: Full 8-eval suite not yet run (2 of 8 completed)
Token savings only visible at 30+ module scale — 8-node fixture too small to demonstrate
next: Run evals for synapse-timeline, synapse-daily-note, synapse-init
Test with Claude Opus and Claude Sonnet models
Consider merging 4 skills into one /synapse parent skill with internal routing
